hypothesis: If AI-guided design conditioned on the presence of Li and Si and targeting capacity >1500 mAh/g and a large stable Li-channel radius can generate Li–Si–X materials that retain the Li-channel radius nearly constant between charged and discharged states and relax to energetically stable structures with mean energy per atom variation < 4%, then AI-designed materials will constitute viable high-capacity, stable silicon-based anode candidates for lithium-ion batteries.
